Part.Source: Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWMONITORACHEQUEPROPRIOS', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) &erroMensagem.Visible = 0 loadwwpContext.Call(&Context) &ChequesSelecionados = 'SEL_CHEQUESTERCEIROS' //&CheCreVlrSdo = true /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CHEVARNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CHEVARNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CHEVARNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &CheMot = nullvalue(&CheMot) &CheTip = nullvalue(&CheTip) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Cheques Próprios' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Vct.Cres.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Vct.Dec.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Nro') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Valor') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Motivo ') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Emissão') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Vcto.') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ do 'loadSelecionados' if &CheDtaVct_To.IsEmpty() &CheDtaVct_To = serverdate() Endif EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount &ActionSelecione.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWActionColumn' &AlterarCheque.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn' &BancoAgenciaConta.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' CheVarNro.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CheVlr.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CheCreVlrSdo.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' CheMot.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CheDtaEmi.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CheDtaVct.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' &gridCheTitNom.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &ActionG.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWActionGroupColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ do 'loadSelecionados' EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &ActionSelecione.TooltipText = "" &AlterarCheque = !'' &ActionG.Clear() &ActionG.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &ActionG.AddItem(1, 'Adicionar Obs') If (CheMot <> MotivoCheque.COMPENSADO and CheMot <> MotivoCheque.CANCELADO and (CheCreVlrSdo = CheVlr ) ) &ActionG.AddItem(2, 'Cancelar') Endif &BancoAgenciaConta = 'B:'+trim(CheBanCod) + ' AG:' + trim(str(CheAgeCod)) + ' C.C:'+ trim(CheCon) if CheTitNom.Length() > 20 &gridCheTitNom = substr(CheTitNom, 1, 20) + '...' Else &gridCheTitNom = CheTitNom Endif If CheMot = MotivoCheque.CANCELADO &ActionSelecione.ColumnClass = !'WWActionColumn WWColumnLineThrough WWColumnLineThroughFirstColumn' &AlterarCheque.ColumnClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WWColumnLineThrough' &BancoAgenciaConta.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' CheVarNro.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' CheVlr.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' CheCreVlrSdo.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' CheMot.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' CheDtaEmi.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' CheDtaVct.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' &gridCheTitNom.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' &ActionG.ColumnClass = !'WWActionGroupColumn WWColumnLineThrough' Else &ActionSelecione.ColumnClass = 'WWActionColumn' &AlterarCheque.ColumnClass = 'WWIconActionColumn' &BancoAgenciaConta.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' CheVarNro.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' CheVlr.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' CheCreVlrSdo.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' Do Case Case CheMot = MotivoCheque.MOTIVO11 or CheMot = MOtivoCheque.COMREAPRESENTACAO CheMot.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell' Case CheMot = MotivoCheque.COMPENSADO CheMot.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnSuccess WWColumnSuccessSingleCell' Case CheMot = MotivoCheque.CANCELADO CheMot.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnLineThrough WWColumnLineThroughSingleCell' Case CheMot = MOtivoCheque.MOTIVO12 or CheMot = MotivoCheque.SEMREAPRESENTACAO CheMot.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Case CheMot = MotivoCheque.REPASSADO CheMot.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnInfo WWColumnInfoSingleCell' Otherwise CheMot.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase CheDtaEmi.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' CheDtaVct.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' &gridCheTitNom.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &ActionG.ColumnClass = 'WWActionGroupColumn' Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &AuxCheCod = CheCod &ActionSelecione.Visible = 1 &IsSelect = false &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) //(CheMot <> MotivoCheque.COMPENSADO and CheMot <> MotivoCheque.CANCELADO and CheCreVlrSdo = 0 ) or (CheCreVlrSdo = 0 and (CheMot = MotivoCheque.MOTIVO11 or CheMot = MotivoCheque.EMITIDO or CheMot = MotivoCheque.COMREAPRESENTACAO)) or (CheCreVlrSdo <> 0) when &CheCreVlrSdo = true; if (CheMot = MotivoCheque.COMPENSADO or CheMot = MotivoCheque.CANCELADO) or (CheCreVlrSdo = 0 and (CheMot = MotivoCheque.MOTIVO12 or CheMot = MotivoCheque.SEMREAPRESENTACAO))// and CheMot <> MotivoCheque.) //#PERMITIR ELES ADICIONAREM OUTROS MOTIVOS# JDF &IsSelect = false &ActionSelecione.Visible = 0 Else do 'IsSelecionado' if &IsSelect = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) Endif Endif EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &ActionG.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &ActionG = 1 Do 'Do AddObs' Case &ActionG = 2 Do 'Do Cancelar' EndCase &ActionG = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInserirCheque' wpLancarChequeProprio.Link('ADD', &Context.EmpCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSaldo' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWSaldo.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcar' For Each Line in Grid if CheMot = MotivoCheque.COMPENSADO or CheMot = MotivoCheque.CANCELADO Else //SELECIONA &IsAchou = false For &sdtChequesItem in &sdtCheques if &sdtChequesItem.CheCod = CheCod &IsAchou = true Exit EndIF EndFor if &IsAchou = false &sdtChequesItem = New() &sdtChequesItem.EmPCod = EmpCod &sdtChequesItem.CheCod = CheCod &sdtChequesItem.CheVlr = CheVlr &sdtChequesItem.CheVlrSdo = CheCreVlrSdo &sdtChequesItem.CheMot = CheMot &sdtCheques.Add(&sdtChequesItem) EndIF Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndFor do 'txtMarcados' refresh EndEvent Event 'DoTalaoCheque' WWTALAO.Popup() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportwwMonitoraChequeProprios.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CheVarNro1.Visible = False &CheVlr1.Visible = False &CheTitNom1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CHEVARNRO' &CheVarNro1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CHEVLR' &CheVlr1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CHETITNOM' &CheTitNom1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CheVarNro2.Visible = False &CheVlr2.Visible = False &CheTitNom2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CHEVARNRO' &CheVarNro2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CHEVLR' &CheVlr2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CHETITNOM' &CheTitNom2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CheVarNro3.Visible = False &CheVlr3.Visible = False &CheTitNom3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CHEVARNRO' &CheVarNro3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CHEVLR' &CheVlr3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CHETITNOM' &CheTitNom3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CHEVARNRO' &CheVarNro2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CHEVARNRO' &CheVarNro3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AddObs' wwduplicataobs.Popup('WWMONITORACHEQUES', EmpCod, CheCreFilCod, CheCreCod, CheCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Cancelar' &CancelaEmpCod = EmpCod &CancelaCheCod = CheCod do 'AnalisaCheque' // CancelarCheque.call(EmpCod,CheCod) // Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CHECRECLICOD" &CheCreCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CHECRECLIRAZ" &CheCreCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CHECREVLRSDO" &CheCreVlrSdo.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CHEMOT" &CheMot.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CHEDTAVCT" &CheDtaVct.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &CheDtaVct_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CHETIP" &CheTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CHEVARNRO' &CheVarNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CHEVLR' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CheVlr1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CHETITNOM' &CheTitNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CHECRECLICOD", "", not &CheCreCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &CheCreCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CHECRECLIRAZ", "", not &CheCreCliRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &CheCreCliRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CHECREVLRSDO", "", not &CheCreVlrSdo.IsEmpty(), 0, &CheCreVlrSdo.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CHEMOT", "", not &CheMot.IsEmpty(), 0, &CheMot, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CHEDTAVCT", "", not (&CheDtaVct.IsEmpty() AND &CheDtaVct_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &CheDtaVct.ToString().Trim(), &CheDtaVct_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CHETIP", "", not &CheTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &CheTip, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CHEVARNRO' AND not &CheVarNro1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CheVarNro1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CHEVLR' AND not &CheVlr1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CheVlr1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CHETITNOM' AND not &CheTitNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CheTitNom1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CHEVARNRO' AND not &CheVarNro2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CheVarNro2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CHEVLR' AND not &CheVlr2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CheVlr2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CHETITNOM' AND not &CheTitNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CheTitNom2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CHEVARNRO' AND not &CheVarNro3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CheVarNro3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CHEVLR' AND not &CheVlr3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CheVlr3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CHETITNOM' AND not &CheTitNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CheTitNom3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Cheque" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event limpar_campo.Click &sdtCheques.Clear() do 'txtMarcados' Refresh EndEvent Event &AlterarCheque.Click wpLancarChequeProprio.Link('ADD', EmpCod, CheCod) EndEvent Event &ActionSelecione.Click &erroMensagem.SetEmpty() &erroMensagem.Visible = 0 //SELECIONA &IsAchou = false If &IsSelect = false //TRUE &IsSelect = true For &sdtChequesItem in &sdtCheques if &sdtChequesItem.CheCod = CheCod &IsAchou = true Exit EndIF EndFor if &IsAchou = false &sdtChequesItem = New() &sdtChequesItem.EmPCod = EmpCod &sdtChequesItem.CheCod = CheCod &sdtChequesItem.CheVlr = CheVlr &sdtChequesItem.CheVlrSdo = CheCreVlrSdo &sdtChequesItem.CheMot = CheMot &sdtCheques.Add(&sdtChequesItem) EndIF Else //FALSE &IsSelect = false For &sdtChequesItem in &sdtCheques if &sdtChequesItem.Checod = CheCod &Index = &sdtCheques.IndexOf(&sdtChequesItem) &sdtCheques.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor EndIf &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) if &IsSelect = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) Endif do 'txtMarcados' EndEvent Sub 'ValidaChequesSelecionados' &IsPrimeiro = true &mensagem.SetEmpty() For &sdtChequesItem in &sdtCheques If &IsPrimeiro = false and (&AuxCheVlrSdo <> &sdtChequesItem.cheVlrSdo or &AuxCheMot <> &sdtChequesItem.CheMot) &mensagem = 'Cheques selecionados devem possuir mesmo motivo/saldo, Você selecionou Cheques com Motivos diferentes ou com e sem pagamentos!' Exit //VALIDAR SE TODOS ESTAO BAIXADOS. //VALIDAR SE ESTAO TODOS COM MESMO MOTIVO Endif &AuxCheVlrSdo = &sdtChequesItem.cheVlrSdo &AuxCheMot = &sdtChequesItem.CheMot &IsPrimeiro = false EndFor EndSub Sub 'AnalisaCheque' For each Order EmpCod,CreCheCod Where EmpCod = &CancelaEmpCod Where CreCheCod = &CancelaCheCod Do CAse CAse CrePedCod <> 0 &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('COMPRAFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 padraoUsuario.Call('G', 'HAVERSERLECIONADO_FCHDV', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod) wpfechafinanceirocompras.Link('WWMONITORACHEQUEPROPRIOS', EmpCod, FilCod, CrePedCod) Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Financeiro Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO]') EndIF CAse CreFrtCod <> 0 //cancela frete wpCancelaFrete.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, CreFrtCod) Otherwise //do CAncelar Duplicata manual retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDUPLICATAS', Status_SimNao.Nao, 3, &AutNiv) If &AutNiv >= 3 wpConfirmaCancelarDuplicata.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) Else msg('Usuário não autorizado a cancelar duplicata necessário nível 3 - WWDUPLICATAS') EndIf EndCAse Exit EndFor Refresh EndSub Sub 'IsSelecionado' For &sdtChequesItem in &sdtCheques If &sdtChequesItem.CheCod = &AuxCheCod &IsSelect = true EndIf EndFor EndSub Sub 'loadSelecionados' padraoUsuario.Call('L', &ChequesSelecionados, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &sdtCheques.FromJson(&PadObs) do 'txtMarcados' EndSub Sub 'txtMarcados' &TotCreVlrSdo = 0 For &sdtChequesItem in &sdtCheques &TotCreVlrSdo += &sdtChequesItem.CheVlr EndFor &numeric = &sdtCheques.Count DuplicatasSelect.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - Cheques Marcados' padraoUsuario.Call('G', &ChequesSelecionados, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &sdtCheques.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod) EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
